(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 1): b2
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 2): b3 on table, b4 on b3
    (on-table b3)
    (on b4 b3)
    (clear b4)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 2): b5 on table, b6 on b5
    (on-table b5)
    (on b6 b5)
    (clear b6)
    
    ;; Tower 5 (height 2): b7 on table, b8 on b7
    (on-table b7)
    (on b8 b7)
    (clear b8)
    
    ;; Tower 6 (height 2): b9 on table, b10 on b9
    (on-table b9)
    (on b10 b9)
    (clear b10)
    
    ;; Tower 7 (height 2): b11 on table, b12 on b11
    (on-table b11)
    (on b12 b11)
    (clear b12)
    
    ;; Tower 8 (height 3): b13 on table, b14 on b13, b15 on b14
    (on-table b13)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (clear b15)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top
      (on b1 b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 on top
      (on b2 b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b3 on top of b4
      (on b3 b4)
      (on-table b4)
      
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b5 on top of b6
      (on b5 b6)
      (on-table b6)
      
      ;; Tower 5 inverted: b7 on top of b8
      (on b7 b8)
      (on-table b8)
      
      ;; Tower 6 inverted: b9 on top of b10
      (on b9 b10)
      (on-table b10)
      
      ;; Tower 7 inverted: b11 on top of b12
      (on b11 b12)
      (on-table b12)
      
      ;; Tower 8 inverted: b13 on top of b15, b15 on top of b14
      (on b13 b15)
      (on b15 b14)
      (on-table b14)
      
      ;; Arm is empty at the end
      (arm-empty)
    )
  )
)

(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1 on table
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 3): b2 on table, b3 on b2, b4 on b3
    (on-table b2)
    (on b3 b2)
    (on b4 b3)
    (clear b4)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 10): b5 on table, b6 on b5, ..., b14 on b13
    (on-table b5)
    (on b6 b5)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (clear b14)
    
    ;; Arm state
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top (already satisfied as it's alone)
      (clear b1)
      (on-table b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b4 on table, b3 on b4, b2 on b3
      (on-table b4)
      (on b3 b4)
      (on b2 b3)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b14 on table, b13 on b14, ..., b5 on b6
      (on-table b14)
      (on b13 b14)
      (on b12 b13)
      (on b11 b12)
      (on b10 b11)
      (on b9 b10)
      (on b8 b9)
      (on b7 b8)
      (on b6 b7)
      (on b5 b6)
      (clear b5)
      
      ;; Arm empty at end
      (arm-empty)
    )
  )
)

  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18 b19 b20)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1: height 1 (b1 on table)
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2: height 1 (b2 on table)
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3: height 9 (b3 on table, b4-b11 stacked on top)
    (on-table b3)
    (on b4 b3)
    (on b5 b4)
    (on b6 b5)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (clear b11)
    
    ;; Tower 4: height 9 (b12 on table, b13-b20 stacked on top)
    (on-table b12)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (on b18 b17)
    (on b19 b18)
    (on b20 b19)
    (clear b20)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 on top
      (on-table b2)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b3 on top (b11 on table, b10-b4-b3 stacked)
      (on-table b11)

      (on b8 b9)

      (on b16 b17)
      (on b15 b16)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b13 b14)
      (on b12 b13)
      (clear b12)
      
      ;; Arm is empty
      (arm-empty)
    )
  )
)

(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects
    b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10
    b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18 b19 b20
    b21 b22 b23
  )
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1 on table
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 2): b2 on table, b3 on b2
    (on-table b2)
    (on b3 b2)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 2): b4 on table, b5 on b4
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (clear b5)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 4): b6 on table, b7 on b6, b8 on b7, b9 on b8
    (on-table b6)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (clear b9)
    
    ;; Tower 5 (height 14): b10 on table, b11 on b10, ..., b23 on b22
    (on-table b10)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (on b18 b17)
    (on b19 b18)
    (on b20 b19)
    (on b21 b20)
    (on b22 b21)
    (on b23 b22)
    (clear b23)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top (already on table, so just clear)
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 on top of b3
      (on-table b3)
      (on b2 b3)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b4 on top of b5
      (on-table b5)
      (on b4 b5)
      (clear b4)
      
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b6 on top, b7, b8, b9 below
      (on-table b9)
      (on b8 b9)
      (on b7 b8)
      (on b6 b7)
      (clear b6)
      
      ;; Tower 5 inverted: b10 on top
      (on-table b23)
      (on b22 b23)
      (on b21 b22)
      (on b20 b21)
      (on b19 b20)
      (on b18 b19)
      (on b17 b18)
      (on b16 b17)
      (on b15 b16)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b13 b14)
      (on b12 b13)
      (on b11 b12)
      (on b10 b11)
      (clear b10)
      
      ;; Arm is empty
      (arm-empty)
    )
  )
)

(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1 on table
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 1): b2 on table
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 1): b3 on table
    (on-table b3)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 2): b4 on table, b5 on b4
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (clear b5)
    
    ;; Tower 5 (height 2): b6 on table, b7 on b6
    (on-table b6)
    (on b7 b6)
    (clear b7)
    
    ;; Tower 6 (height 8): b8 on table, b9-b15 stacked above
    (on-table b8)
    (on b9 b8)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (clear b15)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1: b1 on table (already satisfied, height 1)
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2: b2 on table (already satisfied, height 1)
      (on-table b2)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3: b3 on table (already satisfied, height 1)
      (on-table b3)
      (clear b3)
      
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b4 on b5, b5 on table
      (on-table b5)
      (on b4 b5)
      (clear b4)
      
      ;; Tower 5 inverted: b6 on b7, b7 on table
      (on-table b7)

      (on-table b15)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b13 b14)
      (on b12 b13)
      (on b11 b12)
      (on b10 b11)
      (on b9 b10)
      (on b8 b9)
      (clear b8)
      
      ;; Arm is empty
      (arm-empty)
    )
  )
)

    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 2): b2, b3
    (on-table b2)
    (on b3 b2)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 4): b4, b5, b6, b7

  (:requirements :strips :typing)
  (:objects
    room1 room2 room3 room4 room5 - room
    ball1 ball2 ball3 ball4 - ball
    gripper1 gripper2 gripper3 - gripper
  )
  (:init
    (at-robby room1)
    (carry ball1 gripper1)
    (carry ball2 gripper2)
    (free gripper3)
    (at ball3 room1)
    (at ball4 room1)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      (carry ball2 gripper1)
      (carry ball1 gripper2)
      (free gripper3)
      (at ball3 room1)
      (at ball4 room1)
    )
  )
)

  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1 on table
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)

    (on-table b2)
    (on b3 b2)
    (on b4 b3)
    (clear b4)

    (on b6 b5)

    (on b13 b12)
    (clear b13)

(define (problem blocksworld-invert-towers)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 1): b2
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 1): b3
    (on-table b3)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 3): b4-b5-b6 (b4 on table, b5 on b4, b6 on top)
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (on b6 b5)
    (clear b6)
    
    ;; Tower 5 (height 3): b7-b8-b9 (b7 on table, b8 on b7, b9 on top)
    (on-table b7)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (clear b9)
    
    ;; Tower 6 (height 3): b10-b11-b12 (b10 on table, b11 on b10, b12 on top)
    (on-table b10)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (clear b12)
    
    ;; Tower 7 (height 3): b13-b14-b15 (b13 on table, b14 on b13, b15 on top)
    (on-table b13)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (clear b15)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top (was on table, now on top of something or still alone)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 on top
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b3 on top
      (clear b3)
      
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b6 on table, b5 on b6, b4 on top
      (on-table b6)
      (on b5 b6)
      (on b4 b5)
      (clear b4)
      
      ;; Tower 5 inverted: b9 on table, b8 on b9, b7 on top
      (on-table b9)
      (on b8 b9)
      (on b7 b8)
      (clear b7)
      
      ;; Tower 6 inverted: b12 on table, b11 on b12, b10 on top
      (on-table b12)
      (on b11 b12)
      (on b10 b11)
      (clear b10)
      
      ;; Tower 7 inverted: b15 on table, b14 on b15, b13 on top
      (on-table b15)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b13 b14)
      (clear b13)
      
      ;; Arm is empty at the end
      (arm-empty)
    )
  )
)

    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 1): b3
    (on-table b3)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 2): b4 on table, b5 on b4
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (clear b5)

    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)

      (on b13 b14)

(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1 on table
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 3): b2, b3, b4 (b2 on table, b3 on b2, b4 on b3)
    (on-table b2)
    (on b3 b2)
    (on b4 b3)
    (clear b4)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 3): b5, b6, b7 (b5 on table, b6 on b5, b7 on b6)
    (on-table b5)
    (on b6 b5)
    (on b7 b6)
    (clear b7)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 3): b8, b9, b10 (b8 on table, b9 on b8, b10 on b9)
    (on-table b8)
    (on b9 b8)
    (on b10 b9)
    (clear b10)
    
    ;; Tower 5 (height 8): b11, b12, b13, b14, b15, b16, b17, b18 (b11 on table, etc.)
    (on-table b11)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (on b18 b17)
    (clear b18)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top (clear)
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 on top (was on bottom)
      (on-table b4)
      (on b3 b4)
      (on b2 b3)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b5 on top (was on bottom)
      (on-table b7)
      (on b6 b7)
      (on b5 b6)
      (clear b5)
      
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b8 on top (was on bottom)
      (on-table b10)

      (clear b8)

      (on b17 b18)
      (on b16 b17)
      (on b15 b16)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b13 b14)
      (on b12 b13)
      (on b11 b12)
      (clear b11)
      
      ;; Arm is empty
      (arm-empty)
    )
  )
)

(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 2): b2 on table, b3 on b2
    (on-table b2)
    (on b3 b2)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 2): b4 on table, b5 on b4
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (clear b5)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 3): b6 on table, b7 on b6, b8 on b7
    (on-table b6)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (clear b8)
    
    ;; Tower 5 (height 4): b9 on table, b10 on b9, b11 on b10, b12 on b11
    (on-table b9)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (clear b12)
    
    ;; Tower 6 (height 4): b13 on table, b14 on b13, b15 on b14, b16 on b15
    (on-table b13)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (clear b16)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top (was on bottom)
      (clear b1)
      (on-table b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 on top (was on bottom), b3 on table
      (on-table b3)
      (on b2 b3)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b4 on top (was on bottom), b5 on table
      (on-table b5)
      (on b4 b5)
      (clear b4)
      
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b6 on top, b7 in middle, b8 on table
      (on-table b8)
      (on b7 b8)
      (on b6 b7)
      (clear b6)
      
      ;; Tower 5 inverted: b9 on top, b10 below, b11 below, b12 on table
      (on-table b12)
      (on b11 b12)
      (on b10 b11)
      (on b9 b10)
      (clear b9)
      
      ;; Tower 6 inverted: b13 on top, b14 below, b15 below, b16 on table
      (on-table b16)
      (on b15 b16)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b13 b14)
      (clear b13)
      
      ;; Arm is empty at the end
      (arm-empty)
    )
  )
)

(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1: height 1, b1 on table
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2: height 1, b2 on table
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3: height 1, b3 on table
    (on-table b3)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 4: height 2, b4 on table, b5 on b4
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (clear b5)
    
    ;; Tower 5: height 3, b6 on table, b7 on b6, b8 on b7
    (on-table b6)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (clear b8)
    
    ;; Tower 6: height 5, b9 on table, b10 on b9, b11 on b10, b12 on b11, b13 on b12
    (on-table b9)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (clear b13)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top (already on table, so just clear)
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 on top (already on table, so just clear)
      (on-table b2)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b3 on top (already on table, so just clear)
      (on-table b3)
      (clear b3)
      
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b5 on table, b4 on top of b5
      (on-table b5)
      (on b4 b5)
      (clear b4)
      
      ;; Tower 5 inverted: b8 on table, b7 on b8, b6 on b7
      (on-table b8)
      (on b7 b8)
      (on b6 b7)
      (clear b6)
      
      ;; Tower 6 inverted: b13 on table, b12 on b13, b11 on b12, b10 on b11, b9 on b10
      (on-table b13)
      (on b12 b13)
      (on b11 b12)
      (on b10 b11)
      (on b9 b10)
      (clear b9)
    )
  )
)

  (:requirements :strips :typing)
  (:objects
    rooma roomb roomc roomd roome roomf roomg roomh roomi - room
    ball1 ball2 ball3 - ball
    left right gripper1 gripper2 gripper3 - gripper
  )
  (:init
    (at-robby rooma)
    (free left)
    (free right)
    (free gripper1)
    (free gripper2)
    (free gripper3)
    (carry ball1 left)
    (carry ball2 right)
    (carry ball3 gripper1)
    (at ball1 rooma)
    (at ball2 rooma)
    (at ball3 rooma)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      (free left)
      (free right)
      (free gripper1)
      (free gripper2)
      (free gripper3)
      (at ball1 roomb)
      (at ball2 roomb)
      (at ball3 roomb)
    )
  )
)

(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18 b19 b20)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1 on table
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 1): b2 on table
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 1): b3 on table
    (on-table b3)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 1): b4 on table
    (on-table b4)
    (clear b4)
    
    ;; Tower 5 (height 4): b5 on table, b6 on b5, b7 on b6, b8 on b7
    (on-table b5)
    (on b6 b5)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (clear b8)
    
    ;; Tower 6 (height 12): b9 on table, b10-b20 stacked
    (on-table b9)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (on b18 b17)
    (on b19 b18)
    (on b20 b19)
    (clear b20)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top (was on bottom)
      (clear b1)
      (on-table b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 on top (was on bottom)
      (clear b2)
      (on-table b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b3 on top (was on bottom)
      (clear b3)
      (on-table b3)
      
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b4 on top (was on bottom)
      (clear b4)
      (on-table b4)
      
      ;; Tower 5 inverted: b5 on top (was on bottom)
      ;; Original: b5(bottom)-b6-b7-b8(top)
      ;; Inverted: b8(bottom)-b7-b6-b5(top)
      (on-table b8)
      (on b7 b8)
      (on b6 b7)
      (on b5 b6)
      (clear b5)
      
      ;; Tower 6 inverted: b9 on top (was on bottom)
      ;; Original: b9(bottom)-b10-...-b20(top)
      ;; Inverted: b20(bottom)-b19-...-b9(top)
      (on-table b20)
      (on b19 b20)
      (on b18 b19)
      (on b17 b18)
      (on b16 b17)
      (on b15 b16)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b13 b14)
      (on b12 b13)
      (on b11 b12)
      (on b10 b11)
      (on b9 b10)
      (clear b9)
    )
  )
)

(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1 on table
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 1): b2 on table
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 3): b3 on table, b4 on b3, b5 on b4
    (on-table b3)
    (on b4 b3)
    (on b5 b4)
    (clear b5)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 6): b6 on table, b7 on b6, b8 on b7, b9 on b8, b10 on b9, b11 on b10
    (on-table b6)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (clear b11)
    
    ;; Tower 5 (height 7): b12 on table, b13 on b12, b14 on b13, b15 on b14, b16 on b15, b17 on b16, b18 on b17
    (on-table b12)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (on b18 b17)
    (clear b18)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top (clear)
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 on top (clear)
      (on-table b2)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b5 on table, b4 on b5, b3 on b4
      (on-table b5)
      (on b4 b5)
      (on b3 b4)
      (clear b3)
      
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b11 on table, b10 on b11, b9 on b10, b8 on b9, b7 on b8, b6 on b7
      (on-table b11)
      (on b10 b11)
      (on b9 b10)
      (on b8 b9)
      (on b7 b8)
      (on b6 b7)
      (clear b6)
      
      ;; Tower 5 inverted: b18 on table, b17 on b18, b16 on b17, b15 on b16, b14 on b15, b13 on b14, b12 on b13
      (on-table b18)
      (on b17 b18)
      (on b16 b17)
      (on b15 b16)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b13 b14)
      (on b12 b13)
      (clear b12)
    )
  )
)

(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1 on table
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 1): b2 on table
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 1): b3 on table
    (on-table b3)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 2): b4 on table, b5 on b4
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (clear b5)
    
    ;; Tower 5 (height 3): b6 on table, b7 on b6, b8 on b7
    (on-table b6)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (clear b8)
    
    ;; Tower 6 (height 3): b9 on table, b10 on b9, b11 on b10
    (on-table b9)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (clear b11)
    
    ;; Tower 7 (height 7): b12 on table, b13 on b12, b14 on b13, b15 on b14, b16 on b15, b17 on b16, b18 on b17
    (on-table b12)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (on b18 b17)
    (clear b18)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 on top
      (on-table b2)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b3 on top
      (on-table b3)
      (clear b3)
      
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b4 on top (was on bottom), b5 on table (was on top)
      (on-table b5)
      (on b4 b5)
      (clear b4)
      
      ;; Tower 5 inverted: b6 on top (was on bottom), b7 in middle, b8 on table (was on top)
      (on-table b8)
      (on b7 b8)
      (on b6 b7)
      (clear b6)
      
      ;; Tower 6 inverted: b9 on top (was on bottom), b10 in middle, b11 on table (was on top)
      (on-table b11)
      (on b10 b11)
      (on b9 b10)
      (clear b9)
      
      ;; Tower 7 inverted: b12 on top (was on bottom), others stacked below
      (on-table b18)
      (on b17 b18)
      (on b16 b17)
      (on b15 b16)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b13 b14)
      (on b12 b13)
      (clear b12)
      
      ;; Arm is empty
      (arm-empty)
    )
  )
)

(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1: height 1 (b1 on table)
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2: height 2 (b2, b3 where b2 on table, b3 on b2)
    (on-table b2)
    (on b3 b2)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 3: height 2 (b4, b5 where b4 on table, b5 on b4)
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (clear b5)
    
    ;; Tower 4: height 4 (b6, b7, b8, b9 where b6 on table)
    (on-table b6)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (clear b9)
    
    ;; Tower 5: height 6 (b10, b11, b12, b13, b14, b15 where b10 on table)
    (on-table b10)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (clear b15)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on table (already satisfied, single block)
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b3 on table, b2 on b3
      (on-table b3)
      (on b2 b3)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b5 on table, b4 on b5
      (on-table b5)
      (on b4 b5)
      (clear b4)
      
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b9 on table, b8 on b9, b7 on b8, b6 on b7
      (on-table b9)
      (on b8 b9)
      (on b7 b8)
      (on b6 b7)
      (clear b6)
      
      ;; Tower 5 inverted: b15 on table, b14 on b15, b13 on b14, b12 on b13, b11 on b12, b10 on b11
      (on-table b15)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b13 b14)
      (on b12 b13)
      (on b11 b12)
      (on b10 b11)
      (clear b10)
      
      ;; Arm is empty at end
      (arm-empty)
    )
  )
)

(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 1): b2
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 3): b3, b4, b5 (b5 on top)
    (on-table b3)
    (on b4 b3)
    (on b5 b4)
    (clear b5)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 6): b6, b7, b8, b9, b10, b11 (b11 on top)
    (on-table b6)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (clear b11)
    
    ;; Tower 5 (height 7): b12, b13, b14, b15, b16, b17, b18 (b18 on top)
    (on-table b12)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (on b18 b17)
    (clear b18)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top (still height 1)
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 on top (still height 1)
      (on-table b2)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b5 on table, b4 on b5, b3 on b4
      (on-table b5)
      (on b4 b5)
      (on b3 b4)
      (clear b3)
      
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b11 on table, b10 on b11, ..., b6 on b7
      (on-table b11)
      (on b10 b11)
      (on b9 b10)
      (on b8 b9)
      (on b7 b8)

    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)

    (on-table b2)

    (clear b1)
